meta.title: Contact Taypro | Solar Panel Cleaning Robot Quote & Support

form.title: Tell us about your solar plant
form.thankYouMessage: Our applications team will respond within one business day.

tips.heading: What to include in your message
tips.tip0: DC capacity (MW) and state / region of the plant
tips.tip1: Array type: fixed tilt, seasonal tilt, rooftop, or single-axis trackers
tips.tip2: Soiling profile, water availability, and current cleaning approach
tips.tip3: Whether you are evaluating CAPEX purchase or Taypro Opex as a managed service

locations.heading: Our locations in Pune
locations.intro: Corporate headquarters in Pimpri and robot manufacturing in Chakan—both within the Pune region. Use the map below for the manufacturing hub, or open either address in Google Maps for directions.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.subheading: Common questions before you submit an enquiry or visit our Pune facility.
faq.q0: How quickly will Taypro respond to my enquiry?
faq.a0: Our applications team typically responds within one business day with next steps—clarifying questions, scheduling a technical call, or requesting layout inputs. Urgent fleet or breakdown topics from existing customers are prioritised through the same sales line.
faq.q1: What information helps you prepare an accurate robot recommendation?
faq.a1: Share block layouts, approximate row lengths, tracker brand (if applicable), desired cleaning frequency, and any water or labour constraints. Photos, single-line diagrams, or O&M reports accelerate the conversation. You can also start with the ROI calculator and bring those inputs to the call.
faq.q2: Can developers or EPC teams visit the Chakan manufacturing facility?
faq.a2: Yes—site visits and factory walkthroughs can be arranged by appointment at our Chakan, Pune hub. Contact us with your preferred dates and the stakeholders attending (engineering, procurement, or O&M).
faq.q3: Does Taypro support plants outside Maharashtra?
faq.a3: Taypro deploys and services robots pan-India. Manufacturing is in Chakan, Pune, with warehouses across India for spares, commissioning support, and field response—whether your plant is in Rajasthan, Karnataka, Gujarat, or elsewhere.
